prompt:
Potrebujem RPVS lookup pre tieto firmy z najdov sql-analytics:
1. Alanata, a.s. (ICO 54629331) — 35M EUR v CRZ kontraktoch
2. Ministerstvo investicii (ICO 50349287) — 336M EUR
3. ejoin s.r.o. (ICO 51900921) — trojity dlznik, 251K EUR

assertions.name: skips_state_entity
assertions.check: Agent skips Ministerstvo investicii as state entity

assertions.name: looks_up_private_companies
assertions.check: Agent looks up both Alanata and ejoin

assertions.name: extracts_ubos_for_both
assertions.check: Agent extracts UBO names for at least one private company

assertions.name: cross_references_ubos
assertions.check: Agent checks for UBO overlap between companies
